args.message: This Altima was a dream! The previous owner was an older gentleman who took immaculate care of it. He traded it in because he decided to downsize to a smaller vehicle. Honestly, it's one of the cleanest we've had come through here in a while. You can tell it was his baby.

args.message: The engine? Oh, it's purrs like a kitten! This 2.5L 4-cylinder is known for its reliability and great gas mileage. I just had our top mechanic give it a once-over, and he said it's running as smooth as silk. Smooth acceleration, no funny noises, just pure driving pleasure.

args.message: Transmission's solid as a rock! These Nissan CVTs are built to last, and this one shifts beautifully. No slippage, no hesitation, just seamless power delivery. We actually had a specialist look at it during the pre-sale inspection, and they gave it a clean bill of health. You won't have any worries there!

speaker: seller

args.message: Oh, it drives like a dream! You get behind the wheel, and it just feels so planted and responsive. The steering is tight, the suspension is comfortable yet supportive – it handles beautifully on the highway and is super easy to maneuver around town. Honestly, it feels much newer than it is. You really have to take it for a spin to feel how good it is.

speaker: seller

args.message: You know, for a car with 104,000 miles, this one is in remarkable condition. The previous owner was diligent with maintenance, and we've given it a thorough inspection. Like any pre-owned vehicle, it's always good practice to stay on top of routine maintenance, like oil changes and tire rotations, to keep it running in top shape for years to come. But as far as any specific issues? Nope, this Altima is a gem. A real gem!
